text.title: Business Analysis Planning Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example showing inputs → procedure → outputs end-to-end for this methodology.

example.context: ACME launches a regulated lending product; BA must seed planning before sprint zero.
example.input: Initiative brief, org chart, hybrid Scrum+Waterfall mandate.
example.output: T1 approach=60/40 plan/change; T2=12 stakeholders verified against org chart; T3 approver=Amaia (VP Product); T4 repo=acme/ba-artefacts/lending/; T5 metrics=[rework_rate, defect_density, elicitation_throughput] all baseline=null.
example.reference: See example_valid for the structured artefact this narrative produces.
